response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, achieved a total annual revenue of $54.4 million, reflecting an impressive 18% year-over-year growth. Quarterly revenues progressed from $12.3 million in Q1 and $14.1 million in Q2, dipping slightly to $11.8 million in Q3, before reaching a peak of $16.2 million in Q4. The company currently employs 342 people across its operations.
